description: Iron's Spells 'n' Spellbooks Module — Brain mapping and role definitions (SHELL).

arcanist.description: A master spellcaster who commands powerful offensive spells.

healer.description: A support caster who heals allies and wards off undead.

warlock.description: A dark spellcaster wielding forbidden summoning and curse magic.

npc_assignments._comment: Maps NPC entity IDs to roles.
